case_title: CHIN, STELLA vs. EVANS, CHRIS et al

docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 414 CAPP STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-10-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE BY NOV. 10, 1994, JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,380.00. INTEREST WAIVED BY PLTF.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, STELLA
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, STELLA SERVED SEP-22-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS

JUDGE GEORGE G. TYLER, RSHACKELFORD, REPORTER, ASAUSA, CLERK 10:45AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JOHN S. CHANG APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRO PER. CASE SETTLED. TERMS AND CONDITION STATED ON RECORD. STIPULATED BETWEEN THE PARTIES THAT PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 414 CAPP STREET NO LATER THAN NOV 10 1994 AT 12:00 MIDNIGHT. IN THE EVENT THAT DEFENDANT AND ALL OTHER OCCUPANT DO NOT MOVE OUT COURT SHALL ENTER JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT THE FOLLOWING. RESTITUTION OF UNIT TO PLAINTIFF. AWARD OF $1,380.00 FOR DAMAGES DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF RENT. AWARD OF $30.00 PER DAY FOR RENT THROUGH THE DATE THE DEFENDANT VACATES THE PREMISES ATTY FEES OF $1,000.00, COSTS $80.00, INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 8% FROM SEP 1, 1994. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, CHRIS
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, STELLA COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-31-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED LIST OF WITNESSES AND PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED LIST OF EXHIBITS FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
